title: Builders Workshop
description: A building focused modpack with a plenty of atmospheric biomes and even more building blocks to help your creative mind create the builds of your dreams.
body:
**Builder's Workshop** is a building focused modpack with a plenty of atmospheric biomes to settle in and even more building blocks and building tweaks to help your creative mind create the builds of your dreams.

Explore a vibrant and beautifull world with the combined work of Cliff Under a Tree and Nature's Spirit.
Then build from a large variety of blocks coming from MissBarbare's Palette & Arts&Craft
And enjoy all the little quality of life and tweaks to get a good building experience.
